scripts.build: pnpm --filter @chaop/protocol build && pnpm --filter @chaop/worker build && pnpm --filter @chaop/web build && cargo build --workspace
scripts.test: pnpm run test:scripts && pnpm --filter @chaop/protocol test && pnpm --filter @chaop/web test && pnpm --filter @chaop/worker test && cargo test --workspace
scripts.test:scripts: node --test test/*.node-test.mjs && bash -n scripts/dogfood-connector.sh && bash -n scripts/test-dogfood-connector.sh && bash scripts/test-dogfood-connector.sh
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @chaop/protocol build && pnpm --filter @chaop/worker typecheck && pnpm --filter @chaop/web typecheck
